Taliban.description: The Taliban is an Afghan political and militant organization that emerged in 1994 during the Second Afghan Civil War. Founded by Mullah Omar, it ruled most of Afghanistan from 1996 to 2001, enforcing a strict interpretation of sharia law. Overthrown by a US-led invasion in 2001, it waged a 20-year insurgency before recapturing Kabul in 2021 and now controls all of Afghanistan. The group is designated as a terrorist organization by several countries and is widely condemned for human rights abuses.

descriptions: Taliban is engaged in a violent counterinsurgency against ISIS–K.
edges.evidence_quote: Since the Taliban took control of the Afghan central government following the United States withdrawal and the collapse of the Afghan National Army (ANA) in August 2021, the Taliban has been locked in a violent counterinsurgency against ISIS–K.

time_periods: during the NATO war in Afghanistan
edges.evidence_quote: Despite the continuing conflict between ISIS–K and the Taliban, the two groups have cooperated with each other on infrequent occasions during the NATO war in Afghanistan, primarily by launching attacks on the minority Shia Hazara.

edges.evidence_quote: The outfit had also cultivated links with the first Taliban regime in Afghanistan and also with Osama bin Laden and his al-Qaeda network.

descriptions: LeT assisted the Taliban in fighting the Northern Alliance in 2002.
edges.evidence_quote: The outfit had claimed that it had assisted the Taliban militia and Osama bin Laden's al-Qaeda network in Afghanistan during November and December 2002 in their fight against the US-aided Northern Alliance.

Clan Cava.description: The Clan Cava is a Camorra organization based in Quindici, province of Avellino, Italy. It has been involved in a bloody feud with the rival Graziano clan for over thirty years. The clan operates in the Vallo di Lauro, Baianese, Nolano, and other areas of Campania, engaging in extortion, contract rigging, usury, and drug trafficking. Despite state crackdowns, it remains one of the most influential clans in the province of Avellino.

descriptions: Infobox lists Cava Clan as ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Cava Clan

descriptions: Clan Cava was associated with Clan Alfieri during the 1980s camorra wars.
edges.evidence_quote: Durante la guerra di camorra tra NCO cutoliana e la Nuova Famiglia , che insanguinò la Campania negli anni '80, i Cava rientrarono nella miriade di clan e gruppi di fuoco associati al potente clan Alfieri

descriptions: Cava was part of the Clan dei Quindiciari alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: I Cava, i Graziano ed altre famiglie criminali erano strette in un'alleanza che formava quello che, un tempo, era detto Clan dei Quindiciari.

descriptions: The Cava clan was part of the unified Clan dei Quindiciari along with the Graziano and other families.
edges.evidence_quote: congiuntamente agli attuali rivali dei Cava e ad altre famiglie criminali, formava un unico gruppo camorristico, denominato "Clan dei Quindiciari".

descriptions: Clan Cava has alliances with Clan Fabbrocino and Clan Russo.
edges.evidence_quote: Ancora oggi, quello schieramento di parte si rispecchia nelle alleanze che i Cava hanno con altri gruppi criminali dell' agro nolano come i clan Russo di Nola e Fabbrocino

descriptions: Clan Cava reached an understanding with Clan Genovese, which accepted Cava's hegemony.
edges.evidence_quote: L'estensione dell'egemonia dei Cava sul territorio della città di Avellino non poteva prescindere dall'instaurarsi di rapporti con organizzazioni ivi operanti (clan Genovese dell' area del Partenio e Meriani di Montoro ), che potevano risolversi o in un conflitto o nel raggiungimento di un'intesa. Di fatto, è stata praticata la seconda delle opzioni

descriptions: Emilio Fusco, a Genovese family member, had connections with Clan Cava.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 30 luglio 2010 è stato stanato, a Sorrento , il boss latitante italoamericano Emilio Fusco, 42 anni, nativo di Quindici ma da tempo trapiantato negli States . Ritenuto un importante esponente della Famiglia Genovese di New York , era ricercato dall' FBI e dalle autorità italiane per omicidi , associazione mafiosa ed estorsione . Secondo le Forze dell'ordine , Fusco aveva collegamenti con il clan Cava .

descriptions: Members acted using their affiliation to both Cava and Genovese clans, which are described as closely linked.
edges.evidence_quote: avvalendosi della loro appartenenza ai clan Cava e Genovese (clan, quest'ultimo, operante nell'hinterland avellinese e strettamente collegato ai Cava)

descriptions: The two clans were in a feud.
edges.evidence_quote: uno dei più terribili atti della faida tra i Cava e i Graziano

descriptions: Clan Cava has been in a bloody feud with Clan Graziano for over thirty years.
edges.evidence_quote: Questa cosca , da oltre trent'anni, è protagonista di una sanguinosa faida con l'altro clan del Vallo di Lauro, quello dei Graziano .

descriptions: Members of the Graziano clan plotted to kill Salvatore Cava and his mother, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: sono stati arrestati 5 esponenti del clan Graziano, che stavano tramando l'eliminazione di Salvatore Cava (figlio del boss Biagio e scarcerato nel maggio dello stesso anno) e della madre di Salvatore Cava

descriptions: Cava and Graziano were in a feud since the early 1980s.
edges.evidence_quote: La mattanza fu conseguenza della faida che, già dai primi anni '80, vedeva contrapposti i Cava ed i Graziano.

descriptions: Cava and Graziano were once allies before the 1980 earthquake.
edges.evidence_quote: Le due potenti cosche - un tempo alleate - entrano in guerra a seguito del Terremoto dell'Irpinia del 1980

descriptions: Clan Cava reached an understanding with Clan Meriani, which accepted Cava's hegemony.
edges.evidence_quote: L'estensione dell'egemonia dei Cava sul territorio della città di Avellino non poteva prescindere dall'instaurarsi di rapporti con organizzazioni ivi operanti (clan Genovese dell' area del Partenio e Meriani di Montoro ), che potevano risolversi o in un conflitto o nel raggiungimento di un'intesa. Di fatto, è stata praticata la seconda delle opzioni

descriptions: Bruno Giugliano and Salvatore Notaro were considered referents for both the Cava and Ruocco-Somma clans, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: ritenuti i referenti nel Nolano dei clan "Cava" di Quindici e "Ruocco-Somma" di Piazzolla di Nola

descriptions: A Cava affiliate had ties with the Genovese family boss Adolfo Bruno.
edges.evidence_quote: Michele Palmese ... aveva tessuto rapporti con Adolfo Bruno - boss della famiglia Genovese - e i figli di questo.

descriptions: Clan Cava, Clan Russo, and Clan Moccia conspired together against Antonio Guerriero.
edges.evidence_quote: Stando a quanto dichiarato dal pentito di Nola Ciro Di Domenico, a tramare contro Guerriero furono tre clan (i Cava, i Russo e i Moccia )

descriptions: Members of Clan Cava, Clan Moccia, and Clan Russo were arrested together for usury and extortion, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: In data 17 giugno 2011 , in Mugnano del Cardinale , San Paolo Bel Sito ed Afragola , nell'ambito di un'attività di indagini finalizzata a contrastare il fenomeno dell'usura e delle estorsioni ai danni di imprenditori operanti nel settore dell’edilizia, militari del Nucleo investigativo, dopo aver acquisito gravi elementi di colpevolezza, in esecuzione di provvedimento emesso dall'Autorità Giudiziaria, sottoponevano a fermo di Polizia Giudiziaria 5 pregiudicati esponenti dei clan Cava di Quindici , Moccia di Afragola e Russo di Nola , ritenuti responsabili dei reati di usura ed estorsione aggravata dalla connotazione mafiosa, per aver commesso il fatto avvalendosi della forza di intimidazione dovuta all'appartenenza ai summenzionati sodalizi criminosi.

descriptions: Cava joined the Nuova Famiglia in the early 1980s.
edges.evidence_quote: l'adesione dei Cava alla Nuova Famiglia

descriptions: The Cava clan joined the Nuova Famiglia.
edges.evidence_quote: e dei Cava alla Nuova Famiglia

descriptions: The Nuovo Clan Partenio was formed by individuals previously linked to the Cava clan but operated without their approval, indicating a splinter or independent faction.
edges.evidence_quote: Tra gli arrestati (23, in tutto) e gli indagati (17, in tutto), figurano alcuni pregiudicati in passato ritenuti legati ai Cava, che avevano costituito il sodalizio di propria iniziativa, operando senza il beneplacito dei Cava

descriptions: Nuovo Ordine di Zona is considered linked to Clan Cava.
edges.evidence_quote: Da segnalare anche il blitz avvenuto in data 3 ottobre 2016 , che ha visto coinvolti numerosi comuni del Mandamento baianese, che ha scardinato una organizzazione dedita alle estorsioni e al racket del cemento, ribattezzata "Nuovo Ordine di Zona" e guidata dal pregiudicato di Avella Antonio Guerriero (alias "Zorro"), soggetto considerato legato al clan Cava

descriptions: Nuovo Ordine di Zona was founded by individuals affiliated with Clan Cava, indicating a structural tie.
edges.evidence_quote: Guerriero e Miele, entrambi di Avella e inquadrati nell'orbita del clan Cava, avevano cercato, complice l'assenza dei vertici del clan, di imporsi autonomamente sul territorio, soprattutto nel settore dell'edilizia (sia pubblica che privata), che, a detta degli investigatori, ha rappresentato una delle principali fonti di approvvigionamento per il "Nuovo Ordine di Zona", organizzazione da loro fondata al fine di controllare le attività, soprattutto gli appalti, in zona.

descriptions: Sangermano clan was once a branch of the Cava clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Agostino Sangermano — oggi indicato quale capo dell'omonimo gruppo criminale, reputato attivo in alcuni comuni del nolano e un tempo propaggine dei Cava.

descriptions: The Sangermano family was a satellite group of Clan Cava, later split into an independent organization.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel Nolano, nella fattispecie, i Cava hanno sempre operato mediante un gruppo satellite facente capo alla famiglia Sangermano, originaria di San Paolo Bel Sito , oggi considerata scissa dal clan Cava ed una organizzazione a sé stante.

descriptions: Fabbrocino was historically strongly linked to the Cava and Russo clans.
edges.evidence_quote: un tempo fortemente legata ai clan Cava e Russo

descriptions: The Graziano and Cava families have been in a long-standing faida since the 1980s.
edges.evidence_quote: faida di Quindici : faida più che decennale tra le famiglie Graziano e Cava

descriptions: The Graziano clan has been in a fierce conflict with the Cava clan for decades.
edges.evidence_quote: Da decenni è coinvolto in un feroce conflitto, nel quale è contrapposto al clan Cava.

descriptions: The two clans were previously allied in a single clan before splitting.
edges.evidence_quote: I due clan, fino ad allora alleati in un unico clan, si scindono.

Ashkenazum.description: Organized crime group active in Argentina in the early 20th century, founded by Simon Rubinstein as a splinter from Zwi Migdal. Specialized in sex trafficking of Eastern European Jewish girls and silk smuggling. Operated in Buenos Aires with up to 700 agents.

descriptions: The infobox lists Zwi Migdal as an ally of Ashkenazum.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Zwi Migdal

descriptions: Ashkenazum was a splinter group that broke away from Zwi Migdal.
edges.evidence_quote: Ashkenazum was founded by Simon Rubinstein as a splinter group from the larger Zwi Migdal

descriptions: Ashkenazum is a splinter group that split from Zwi Migdal.
edges.evidence_quote: Zwi Migdal later split and a splinter group led by Simon Rubinstein established its own society named Ashkenazum.

Tanglewood Boys.description: The Tanglewood Boys was an Italian-American recruitment gang or farm team for the Lucchese crime family, operating from the Tanglewood Shopping Center in Yonkers, New York. Active from the 1990s to the 2000s, the gang was involved in murders, assaults, armed robbery, arsons, and bookmaking in Westchester County, the Bronx, and the Upper West Side. Many members were sons of made men. The gang's downfall followed high-profile murders and subsequent prosecutions.

descriptions: The American Mafia is allied with the Tanglewood Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Sicilian Mafia, Camorra, 'Ndrangheta, various independent Italian-American gangs (such as the 10th & Oregon Crew, Purple Gang, and Tanglewood Boys)

descriptions: The American Mafia lists Tanglewood Boys as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Sicilian Mafia , Camorra , 'Ndrangheta , Sacra corona unita , varias pandillas independientes ítaloestadounidenses (como la 10th & Oregon Crew , Purple Gang , South Brooklyn Boys , y Tanglewood Boys )

descriptions: Lucchese family lists Tanglewood Boys as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Tanglewood Boys

descriptions: The Tanglewood Boys is a recruitment gang operating under the Lucchese family.
edges.evidence_quote: The Tanglewood Boys was a "recruitment gang" that operated in Westchester County, The Bronx, and Manhattan.

descriptions: The Tanglewood Boys served as a recruitment gang for the Lucchese family.
edges.evidence_quote: In the 1990s, Santorelli led the Tanglewood Boys, a recruitment gang for the Lucchese family.

descriptions: Lucchese soldier Petrucelli was also a member of the Tanglewood Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: He had served as a soldier for the Lucchese family, and as a member of the Tanglewood Boys.

descriptions: Tanglewood Boys are listed as allies of South Brooklyn Boys in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Italian-American Mafia , Tanglewood Boys , Ozone Park Boys , Gallo Crew (early)

descriptions: The Albanian Boys are listed as rivals of the Tanglewood Boys in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Various gangs in Westchester County and New York City, including the Albanian Boys

descriptions: A Genovese crime family hitman shot a Tanglewood Boys member during an argument.
edges.evidence_quote: Zanfardino pulled out a gun and shot Mazzarelli and pointed the gun at Santorelli before leaving the scene.

descriptions: Tanglewood Boys served as a recruitment gang for the Lucchese crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: The Tanglewood Boys was an Italian-American recruitment gang or " farm team " for the American Mafia , specifically the Lucchese crime family .

descriptions: A member of the Corso dei Mille family participated in the murder of Giuseppe Calderone alongside the Catania family's Santapaola faction.
edges.evidence_quote: Ignazio Ingrassia ... a man of honor from the Corso dei Mille family, closely associated with Michele Greco.

descriptions: The Corso Dei Mille family aligned with the Corleonesi.
edges.evidence_quote: Amongst those who aligned themselves with the Corleonesi were ... Filippo Marchese (boss of Corso Dei Mille)

edges.source: Gang de la Brise de Mer
descriptions: The infobox lists Venzolasca Gang as a rival of Brise de Mer.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Petit Bar Gang , Venzolasca Gang , Armata Corsa

edges.source: Gang de la Brise de Mer
descriptions: Venzolasca Gang took over territory from the Brise de Mer Gang in 2010.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2010, The "Venzolasca Gang" penetrated large amounts of territory previously occupied by the Brise de Mer Gang.

edges.source: Gang de la Brise de Mer
descriptions: The Venzolasca Gang is considered the successor of the Brise de Mer gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Known groups in the Corsican mafia are the Venzolasca Gang ... considered the Brise de Mer successors.

descriptions: A member moved from VIS to SIC, indicating a structural tie.
edges.evidence_quote: Pantyu Pantev, a.k.a. "Polly" - Drug smuggler, initially affiliated with VIS, later with SIC.

descriptions: The Pirus allied with the Denver Lanes to oppose the Crips.
edges.evidence_quote: the 300 Playboy Piru Bloods formed an alliance with other smaller street gangs such as the Brims, Bishops and Denver Lanes, which also opposed the Crips.

Thak Thak gang.description: The Thak Thak gang is a criminal group active in North India, especially the National Capital Region. It specializes in targeting parked vehicles and using deceptive tactics to distract victims before stealing cash and valuables. The group frequently changes location to evade arrest.

Bloque Meta.description: Colombian drug trafficking and neo-paramilitary organization formed after the demobilization of the AUC in 2006. It emerged from the ERPAC and was active in the eastern plains of Colombia, particularly Meta department. The group was known for its brutality and had around 260 members. It was declared completely dismantled after the capture of its last leader in September 2017.

edges.target: Ejército Revolucionario Popular Antisubversivo de Colombia
descriptions: Bloque Meta partly formed from ERPAC.
edges.evidence_quote: When the AUC demobilized in 2006, many former members of the organization formed ERPAC, which would later partly become the Bloque Meta

descriptions: Bloque Meta and Libertadores del Vichada fought each other.
edges.evidence_quote: These groups fight each other over the control of drug trafficking in the eastern Meta department.

descriptions: Bloque Meta and Libertadores del Vichada were reunited into Los Puntilleros.
edges.evidence_quote: the two blocs were in the hands of the drug trafficker Mauricio Pachón Rozo, also known as "Puntilla", reunited the two groups; This time with a new name: "Los Puntilleros"

descriptions: Bloque Meta fought against FARC.
edges.evidence_quote: to continue the counterrevolutionary struggle against the FARC in Colombia's eastern plains.

descriptions: Libertadores del Vichada and Meta Block are described as rivals, both formed from ERPAC remnants.
edges.evidence_quote: the remaining 600 were believed to have joined Libertadores de Vichada or the rivalling Meta Block.

'Ndrina Bubbo.description: The Bubbo are a 'ndrina (clan) of the 'Ndrangheta, a Calabrian mafia, operating in Petronà, Cerva, and Sersale, Italy. They are allied with the Nicoscia, Farao-Marincola, and Trovato clans. Involved in arms trafficking and a feud with the Carpino clan in the 1990s, with violence extending to Lecco. In 2020, members were arrested in Operation Borderland.

descriptions: The Paparo are allied with the Barbaro, Bubbo, Nicoscia, and Arena.
edges.evidence_quote: i Paparo alleati dei Barbaro, dei Bubbo, dei Nicoscia e degli Arena

descriptions: Bubbo and Carpino were in a feud (faida) in the 1990s.
edges.evidence_quote: scoppia una faida nella pre-sila catanzarese tra i Bubbo e i Carpino

descriptions: Bubbo is allied with Farao-Marincola.
edges.evidence_quote: alleata dei ... Farao-Marincola

descriptions: Bubbo is allied with Nicoscia.
edges.evidence_quote: alleata dei Nicoscia

descriptions: Bubbo sold weapons to Paparo.
edges.evidence_quote: Avrebbero venduto delle armi ai Paparo

descriptions: Bubbo killed Alberto Carpino of Trataculo, leading to a retaliation attempt by Trataculo against Bubbo.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 4 febbraio 2000 viene ucciso a Petronà Alberto Carpino della 'ndrina dei Trataculo. Come ritorsione, nel 2001, due loro affiliati ... sarebbero stati in procinto di andare a Galbiate per eliminare Filippo Bubbo

descriptions: Bubbo is allied with Trovato.
edges.evidence_quote: alleata dei ... Trovato

descriptions: Bubbo is intranei (insider) to the Locale di Galbiate together with Trovato.
edges.evidence_quote: sarebbero intranei alla " Locale di Galbiate " con i Trovato

descriptions: The Bubbo attacked members of the Carpino in 1993.
edges.evidence_quote: Alfredo Covelli e Salvatore Carpino subiscono un attentato da parte dei Bubbo

descriptions: Bubbo is listed as an allied 'ndrina of the Nicoscia.
edges.evidence_quote: 'Ndrine alleate - Bubbo

descriptions: Bacchus was allied with Para-Dice Riders through the Hells Angels sphere.
edges.evidence_quote: The Bacchus Club had long been closely allied to many clubs in Toronto. In 1997, the Para-Dice Riders became closely allied to the Hells Angels, which likewise pulled the Bacchus into the Hells Angels sphere of friendly clubs.

descriptions: Para-Dice Riders opposed Hells Angels' dominance in Ontario.
edges.evidence_quote: The Outlaws and several affiliated independent clubs such as Satan's Choice and Para-Dice Riders were able to keep the Angels from assuming a dominant position in Ontario, Canada's most populous province until 2000.

descriptions: The Para-Dice Riders were affiliated with the Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: The only gang affiliated with the Hells Angels in Ontario is the Para-Dice Riders.

descriptions: Para-Dice Riders members joined Hells Angels in a mass patch-over.
edges.evidence_quote: On 29 December 2000, most of the Ontario biker gangs in a mass 'patch over' ... joined the Hells Angels. ... 179 bikers from the Satan's Choice, Para-Dice Riders, the Last Chance, the Lobos, the Outlaws and the Rock Machine joined the Hells Angels

descriptions: Para-Dice Riders patched over to become Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: the Para-Dice Riders ... all abandoned their old patches for the 'Death's Head' patch of the Angels

descriptions: Para-Dice Riders patched over to the Hells Angels in 2000.
edges.evidence_quote: This resulted in 168 members of the Para-Dice Riders, Satan's Choice, Lobos and Last Chance "patching" to the Angels.

descriptions: After a split in 1997, a faction of the Loners joined the Para-Dice Riders.
edges.evidence_quote: The pro-Hells Angel faction led by Grano joined the Para-Dice Riders while a rump remained under Raso.

descriptions: Para-Dice Riders merged into Hells Angels on December 29, 2000.
edges.evidence_quote: Satan's Choice, along with most of the other major Ontario biker gangs, including the Loners, Lobos, and Para-Dice Riders, 'patched over' to the Hells Angels on December 29, 2000.

descriptions: Satan's Choice and Para-Dice Riders jointly operated a methamphetamine factory in 1983.
edges.evidence_quote: A series of police raids in 1983 in Madoc discovered a methamphetamine factory operated jointly by Satan's Choice and the Para-Dice Riders that produced about $3.6 million worth of methamphetamine per month.

descriptions: The Malpassoti clan was allied with the Laudani clan and thus supported the Catania faction of Cursoti.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 1991 scoppiò una violenta faida, che vide contrapposti da un lato i Cursoti catanesi, guidati da Giuseppe Garozzo e da Santo Mazzei e appoggiati dal clan Laudani (e quindi dai Santapaola , Ferrera, Ercolano e dai Malpassoti ), e dall’altro i milanesi, facenti capo a Jimmy Miano e supportati dal clan Cappello

descriptions: Infoboox lists Noonan Crime Family as ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Noonan Crime Family

descriptions: The Noonan family forged links with the Cheetham Hill Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Damian and Desmond Noonan were forging links with other notable Manchester gangs including the Cheetham Hill and Salford gangs.

descriptions: The Noonan family participated in a truce that included the Quality Street Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Other gangland figures participating in this truce were Paul Massey, Damian Noonan, Paul Flannery and apparently Jimmy 'the Weed' Donnelly, who was a prominent figure in the Quality Street Gang, another Manchester gang.

Clan Russo dei Quartieri Spagnoli.description: Camorra clan operating in the Quartieri Spagnoli neighborhood of Naples, Italy. Founded by Domenico Russo, known as 'Mimì dei cani', and later led by his sons. Engaged in drug trafficking, extortion, and a violent feud with the Di Biasi clan. The clan emerged victorious and continues to exert control over the area.

descriptions: Russo clan is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Russo clan

descriptions: The Russo clan threatened the Di Biasi's dominance in the neighborhood.
edges.evidence_quote: Ma il loro predominio nel quartiere è stato sempre in bilico e minacciato dal clan Russo.

descriptions: Fabbrocino was historically strongly linked to the Cava and Russo clans.
edges.evidence_quote: un tempo fortemente legata ai clan Cava e Russo

descriptions: Russo clan formed an alliance with Mazzarella clan in recent years.
edges.evidence_quote: In recent years, the new leaders of the Russo clan, from Nola, also formed an alliance with the Mazzarellas.

descriptions: The Russo brothers were lieutenants of Carmine Alfieri and later replaced the Alfieri clan.
edges.evidence_quote: I Russo, già luogotenenti di Carmine Alfieri hanno, dopo la sua fine, sostituito il clan Alfieri , in cui avevano militato.

descriptions: Clan Russo fought a war against Clan Faiano, resulting in deaths on both sides.
edges.evidence_quote: Il clan è stato protagonista di una guerra che li ha visti misurarsi con il clan "Faiano" e che ha provocato vittime eccellenti da entrambe le parti.

descriptions: Clan Russo planned to expand into territory once controlled by Clan Fabbrocino.
edges.evidence_quote: la nuova generazione dei Russo, che avrebbe cominciato a seguire un piano per allargarsi fino a San Giuseppe Vesuviano , una volta territorio del clan Fabbrocino.

descriptions: The new management of Clan Russo formed an alliance with the Mazzarella clan of Naples.
edges.evidence_quote: La nuova gestione del clan ha anche stretto un'alleanza con il clan Mazzarella di Napoli.

descriptions: Clan Russo is allied with Clan Misso through marriage and alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: L'ultimo dei figli di Mimì, Salvatore, ha sposato la figlia di Ciro Lepre, detto 'o sceriffo, il boss del Cavone, anch'egli alleato di Misso.

descriptions: A member of Clan Russo is affiliated with Clan Puccinelli.
edges.evidence_quote: Uno di loro risulta affiliato al clan Puccinelli di Soccavo dove da poco è uscito dal carcere, dopo una detenzione di 3 anni e mezzo per estorsione aggravata.

descriptions: Clan Russo and Clan Moccia conspired together with Clan Cava against Antonio Guerriero.
edges.evidence_quote: Stando a quanto dichiarato dal pentito di Nola Ciro Di Domenico, a tramare contro Guerriero furono tre clan (i Cava, i Russo e i Moccia )

descriptions: The Di Blasi and Russo clans fought a war in the late 1990s and early 2000s.
edges.evidence_quote: terza faida dei Quartieri Spagnoli : fu la guerra combattuta, tra fine anni novanta e inizio anni duemila, tra il clan Di Biasi ... e i Russo

descriptions: Russo clan is listed as an ally of Moccia clan in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Russo clan , Alfieri clan (defunct) , Licciardi clan , Galasso clan (defunct) , Sacco-Bocchetti clan , Contini clan

descriptions: Nice Time Kids is a rival of The Americans.
edges.evidence_quote: The Rivals of the Americans gang include all gangs affiliated to the British gang corporate body. These include the Hard Livings , 28s street gang, Junky Funky Kids, Ghetto Kids, Nice Time Kids, The Terrible West Siders, The Fancy Boys, 6bop gang, Mongrels, Young Gifteds and Terrible Josters.

descriptions: Flower Park Rifa was a historical street click of Westside Locos 13.
edges.evidence_quote: Flower Park Rifa

descriptions: AQIM listed Al-Qaeda in the Sinai Peninsula as an ally in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Non-state allies ... Al-Qaeda in the Sinai Peninsula (2007–2017)

descriptions: The Farruku and Kërtalla crime groups had violent clashes.
edges.evidence_quote: Farruku’s criminal activity began in Albania with violent clashes between the Farruku and Kërtalla crime groups

descriptions: D'Aquila allied with the Morello gang to fight the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1916 the Camorra had assassinated Nicholas Morello, head of the Morello gang. In response, D'Aquila allied with the Morellos to fight the Camorra.

descriptions: D'Aquila fought against the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1916 the Camorra had assassinated Nicholas Morello, head of the Morello gang. In response, D'Aquila allied with the Morellos to fight the Camorra.

descriptions: D'Aquila and Masseria were rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: By 1920, D'Aquila's only significant rival was Giuseppe "Joe the Boss" Masseria.

descriptions: D'Aquila absorbed the Mineo gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Soon after, D'Aquila absorbed the Mineo gang, making Mineo his first lieutenant.

descriptions: The D'Aquila gang later evolved into the Gambino crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: He became a bootlegger and joined the D'Aquila gang during the 1920s – later evolved into the Gambino crime family.

descriptions: Masseria's gunmen assassinated D'Aquila.
edges.evidence_quote: On October 10, 1928, Masseria gunmen assassinated Salvatore D'Aquila outside his home.

Santa.description: The Santa (or Società maggiore) is a high-level criminal organization within the 'Ndrangheta, founded in the mid-1970s. Members, called santisti, can interact with non-members including police, politicians, and Freemasons. The group has its own rituals and hierarchy, with a maximum of 33 members originally, later expanded. It is considered one of the highest ranks in the Calabrian mafia.

descriptions: Santa was created within 'Ndrangheta as a higher-level secret society.
edges.evidence_quote: nata a metà degli anni settanta in seno alla 'Ndrangheta

descriptions: Vangelo is a higher rank within the Società maggiore, above Santa.
edges.evidence_quote: un grado superiore il Vangelo

descriptions: Bilal Alameddine wrote a friendly letter to Mahmoud Ahmad, suggesting a cooperative relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: Bilal Alameddine wrote a friendly letter to Mahmoud 'Brownie' Ahmad

descriptions: The Ahmad family are close allies of the Hamzys.
edges.evidence_quote: the Ahmads, close allies of the Hamzys

descriptions: The Comancheros and Ahmads were involved in a skirmish with shootings.
edges.evidence_quote: The 2022 Comanchero–Ahmad skirmish

descriptions: The Elmir and Ahmad families were at war starting in 2016.
edges.evidence_quote: The war began when Safwan Charbaji, a relative of Steven Elmir, was shot to death at a smash-repair shop by Walid 'Wally' Ahmad in April 2016.

Toonerville Rifa 13.description: Mexican-American street gang based in Atwater Village, Los Angeles County, founded in the 1930s. Engages in murder, assault, drug trafficking, racketeering, and other crimes. Allied with the Mexican Mafia and Sureños, and rivals several other gangs. Still active.

descriptions: Toonerville Rifa 13 is listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Toonerville Rifa 13

descriptions: Toonerville Rifa 13 es enemiga de Armenian Power según infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Toonerville Rifa 13

descriptions: Armenian Power is listed as a rival of Toonerville Rifa 13.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Armenian Power , The Avenues , Westside Locos The Rascals, Frogtown Rifa , Vineland Boys , MS-13 , Russian mafia , Norte-14

descriptions: Frogtown Rifa is listed as a rival of Toonerville Rifa 13.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Armenian Power , The Avenues , Westside Locos The Rascals, Frogtown Rifa , Vineland Boys , MS-13 , Russian mafia , Norte-14

descriptions: MS-13 is listed as a rival of Toonerville Rifa 13.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Armenian Power , The Avenues , Westside Locos The Rascals, Frogtown Rifa , Vineland Boys , MS-13 , Russian mafia , Norte-14

descriptions: Mexican Mafia is listed as an ally of Toonerville Rifa 13.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Mexican Mafia , Sureños

descriptions: Norte-14 is listed as a rival of Toonerville Rifa 13.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Armenian Power , The Avenues , Westside Locos The Rascals, Frogtown Rifa , Vineland Boys , MS-13 , Russian mafia , Norte-14

descriptions: The Avenues is listed as a rival of Toonerville Rifa 13.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Armenian Power , The Avenues , Westside Locos The Rascals, Frogtown Rifa , Vineland Boys , MS-13 , Russian mafia , Norte-14

descriptions: The Rascals is listed as a rival of Toonerville Rifa 13.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Armenian Power , The Avenues , Westside Locos The Rascals, Frogtown Rifa , Vineland Boys , MS-13 , Russian mafia , Norte-14

descriptions: Vineland Boys is listed as a rival of Toonerville Rifa 13.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Armenian Power , The Avenues , Westside Locos The Rascals, Frogtown Rifa , Vineland Boys , MS-13 , Russian mafia , Norte-14

descriptions: Westside Locos is listed as a rival of Toonerville Rifa 13.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Armenian Power , The Avenues , Westside Locos The Rascals, Frogtown Rifa , Vineland Boys , MS-13 , Russian mafia , Norte-14

descriptions: Toonerville Rifa 13 is a main rival of Westside Locos 13.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang's main rivals include the nearby Toonerville Rifa 13

descriptions: Four Corner Hustlers are rivals of Mafia Insane Vice Lords.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Folk Nation , Gangster Disciples , Black Souls , New Breed Black Gangsters , Mafia Insane Vice Lords , Angelo Four Corner Hustlers

descriptions: These three sets formed the ATF alliance together.
edges.evidence_quote: the Acacia Blocc Compton Crips, Farm Dog Compton Crips and Spook Town Compton Crips were united in an alliance called "ATF".

descriptions: These three sets formed the ATF alliance together.
edges.evidence_quote: the Acacia Blocc Compton Crips, Farm Dog Compton Crips and Spook Town Compton Crips were united in an alliance called "ATF".

descriptions: Infobox lists Farm Dog Compton Crips as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Farm Dog Compton Crips

descriptions: Facchineri-Varone were in conflict with Raso in the 1960s faida.
edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni sessanta scoppia la prima faida fra i Facchineri-Varone(alleati ai Marvaso e Monteleone) e i Raso, gli Albanese , i Gullace e i De Raco.

descriptions: Facchineri were in conflict with Raso (allied with Albanese and Gullace) in the Cittanova feud.
edges.evidence_quote: La faida continuò fino al 1980 e vide la sconfitta dei Facchineri a opera degli Albanese-Raso-Gullace

descriptions: Facchineri and Raso were in conflict in the second Cittanova feud, won by Facchineri.
edges.evidence_quote: Seconda faida di Cittanova : emerge dal 1987 e termina nel 1991 con la vittoria dei Facchineri sui Raso-Albanese-Gullace.

descriptions: La Maggiore (Nirta Scalzone) was involved with Raso in the Locale di Aosta.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 23 gennaio 2019 in Valle d'Aosta vengono arrestate 16 persone ... riconducibili ai Nirta Scalzone, ai Raso e ai Mammoliti

descriptions: Piromalli had contacts with 'Ndrina Raso for money laundering.
edges.evidence_quote: Ha avuto rapporti anche con la 'ndrina dei Raso , Gullace , e Albanese , di Cittanova e operanti in Liguria
